title: The Hidden Risks of Having a Rival
subtitle: 对手让你更强，也可能让你失控

paragraphs.en: Having a rival can keep you committed to achieving your goals and enhance your overall performance. But before you go out and find an entrepreneur to outcompete, it's important to understand and avoid the traps that often come with rivalry. After all, competitive rivalry can also hinder effective decision-making and increase your willingness to take risks, behaviors that can ultimately hurt your venture's success.
paragraphs.zh: 拥有竞争对手可以让你始终专注于实现目标并提升整体表现。但在你寻找想要超越的对手之前，理解并避开竞争中常见的陷阱至关重要。毕竟，竞争也会阻碍有效决策，增加你冒险的意愿，这些行为最终可能损害你的事业成功。

paragraphs.en: Finding someone you're committed to outcompeting can be a great way to stay focused on your goals and push your venture to the next level. But when you're intently focused on outperforming your rivals, you may begin to develop a win-at-all-costs mentality that causes you to ignore how you achieve success. One group of researchers, for example, examined the link between rivalry and unethical behavior. They found that when people compete against their rivals, they are more willing to behave unethically to win. But such behavior may stain your reputation and strain relationships important to your success.
paragraphs.zh: 找一个决心超越的对手是保持专注和推动事业更上一层楼的好方法。但当你全神贯注于超越对手时，可能会养成一种“不惜一切代价取胜”的心态，导致你忽视取得成功的方式。例如，一组研究人员考察了竞争与不道德行为之间的联系，发现当人们与对手竞争时，更愿意为了赢而做出不道德行为。但这种行为可能玷污你的声誉，并损害对你成功至关重要的人际关系。

paragraphs.en: One way to avoid this trap is to stop and reflect on what's important. While outperforming your rivals may provide short-term benefits, the loss of your integrity will have long-term consequences. One reason having a rival can enhance your venture's performance is that it creates a level of excitement that drives you to work harder. But this eagerness to win may also hurt your venture's success, particularly when it causes you to make impulsive, insensible decisions.
paragraphs.zh: 避免这一陷阱的方法之一是停下来反思什么才是真正重要的。虽然超越对手可能带来短期利益，但失去诚信将带来长期后果。竞争对手能提升你企业绩效的一个原因是，它会激发一定的兴奋感，驱使你更加努力。但这种求胜心切也可能损害你的事业，尤其是当它导致你做出冲动、不明智的决定时。

paragraphs.en: But it's possible to avoid such costly mistakes by making a habit of engaging in critical thinking, such as considering opposing viewpoints and conducting cost-benefit analyses, especially for those decisions that are complex and can determine the future of your venture. The sense of eagerness that comes with having a rival can not only cause you to make poorer decisions, but it can also lead you to take greater risks that put your venture in peril. One way you can overcome the risk-inducing effects of rivalry that stand to endanger your venture's success is to remain attentive to your emotional state and actively monitor how such feelings are affecting your decision-making.
paragraphs.zh: 不过，你可以通过养成批判性思维的习惯来避免此类代价高昂的错误，比如考虑对立观点、进行成本效益分析，尤其是在那些复杂且能决定企业未来的重大决策上。竞争对手带来的急切感不仅会导致更糟糕的决策，还会让你冒更大的风险，使事业陷入危险。克服竞争引发的风险效应、避免危及企业成功的一种方法是关注自己的情绪状态，主动监控这些情绪如何影响你的决策。
